summary: Iteration 38 - Payout Reports Export & Royalty Import System. All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/csv returns 200 with CSV content type
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/csv has Content-Disposition header with .csv filename
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/csv has expected column headers (Artist, Platform, Country, Streams, Gross Revenue, Artist %, Artist Earnings, Label %, Label Earnings, Period)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/csv requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/pdf returns 200 with application/pdf content type
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/pdf has Content-Disposition header with .pdf filename
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/pdf returns valid PDF content (starts with %PDF)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/export/pdf requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/label/royalties/import returns 200 with valid CSV
Backend: POST /api/label/royalties/import parses CSV data correctly (3 rows, $25.75 revenue)
Backend: POST /api/label/royalties/import auto-detects column mapping from various header names
Backend: POST /api/label/royalties/import returns 400 when Artist column is missing
Backend: POST /api/label/royalties/import returns error when no file uploaded
Backend: POST /api/label/royalties/import requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports returns 200 with imports array
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports returns imports with expected fields (id, filename, total_rows, matched, unmatched, total_revenue, created_at)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports/{import_id} returns 200 with import and entries
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports/{import_id} returns entries with expected fields (id, artist_name_raw, track, platform, streams, revenue, status)
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports/{import_id} returns 404 for invalid import ID
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties/imports/{import_id} requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: PUT /api/label/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign returns 200 and assigns entry
Backend: PUT /api/label/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign updates entry status to 'matched'
Backend: PUT /api/label/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign returns 404 for invalid entry ID
Backend: PUT /api/label/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign requires authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Label Dashboard has 3 tabs (Overview, Royalty Splits, Payouts & Import)
Frontend: Payouts & Import tab renders correctly with export section, import section, and import history
Frontend: Export CSV button triggers file download with .csv extension
Frontend: Export PDF button triggers file download with .pdf extension
Frontend: CSV dropzone is visible with drag-and-drop functionality
Frontend: CSV upload shows import result panel with Total Rows, Matched, Unmatched, Total Revenue
Frontend: Import result shows detected columns mapping
Frontend: Import history table shows past imports with filename, rows, matched, unmatched, revenue, date, actions
Frontend: View button opens import detail modal
Frontend: Import detail modal shows entries with Status, Artist (Raw), Matched To, Track, Platform, Streams, Revenue, Action
Frontend: Unmatched entries have 'Assign' button in modal
Frontend: Modal closes correctly with X button
critical_code_review_comments: Export endpoints correctly use StreamingResponse with proper Content-Disposition headers
CSV import uses fuzzy matching (SequenceMatcher) with 0.7 threshold for artist matching
Column detection supports multiple aliases (e.g., 'artist', 'artist name', 'performer', 'primary artist')
Import creates entries in imported_royalties collection and import record in royalty_imports collection
Email notifications are sent to matched artists with their earnings
Frontend properly handles file upload via both click and drag-and-drop
Import result panel shows detected column mapping for transparency
seed_data_creation: Multiple test imports created during testing (ui_test_import.csv, status_test.csv, assign_test.csv, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested Payout Reports Export & Royalty Import System. All endpoints working: GET /api/label/royalties/export/csv (downloads CSV), GET /api/label/royalties/export/pdf (downloads PDF), POST /api/label/royalties/import (uploads CSV with fuzzy matching), GET /api/label/royalties/imports (lists imports), GET /api/label/royalties/imports/{import_id} (shows entries), PUT /api/label/royalties/entries/{entry_id}/assign (assigns unmatched entry). Frontend at /label has 'Payouts & Import' tab with export buttons, drag-and-drop CSV upload zone, import result panel, and import history table. Import detail modal shows matched/unmatched entries with assign functionality.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

GET /api/label/royalties/export/csv.returns: CSV file with headers: Artist, Platform, Country, Streams, Gross Revenue, Artist %, Artist Earnings, Label %, Label Earnings, Period

POST /api/label/royalties/import.input: CSV file with Artist column (required), optional: Track, Platform, Country, Streams, Revenue, Period
features: Sends email notifications to matched artists

GET /api/label/royalties/imports.returns: Array of imports with id, filename, total_rows, matched, unmatched, total_revenue, created_at

returns: entries array with id, artist_name_raw, matched_artist_id, matched_artist_name, track, platform, country, streams, revenue, period, status

PUT /api/label/royalties/entries/{entry_.action: Assigns unmatched entry to specified artist, updates status to 'matched', updates import stats

import_detail_modal: Entries table with Status, Artist (Raw), Matched To, Track, Platform, Streams, Revenue, Action
